title: Anthropogenic Extremely Low Volatility Organics (ELVOCs) govern the growth of molecular clusters over the southern great plains during the springtime
author: Shrivastava, Manish and Zhang, Jie and Zaveri, Rahul A and Zhao, Bin and Pierce, Jeffrey R and O’Donnell, Samuel E and Fast, Jerome D and Gaudet, Brian and Shilling, John E and Zelenyuk, Alla and others
